summary: The AI landscape is rapidly evolving with significant investments and innovations in various sectors. Companies like Databricks, Bunkerhill, and Neko Health are making strides in AI adoption, while regulatory bodies are taking steps to ensure responsible AI development and deployment.
insight: The increasing adoption of AI in industries such as healthcare, finance, and education is driving the need for more efficient and secure AI infrastructure, creating opportunities for companies that can provide scalable and reliable AI solutions.
highlights: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
Neko Health raises $700 million to expand AI body scans in the US
Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe

articles.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
articles.description: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
